transportation.title: How to Get to Bilebante Village
transportation.subtitle: Complete access guide to Bilebante Green Tourism Village.
transportation.air_desc: Lombok International Airport (LOP) — Praya. From the airport, continue by land about 30-45 minutes to Bilebante Village.
transportation.land_desc: From Mataram City (provincial capital) about 45-60 minutes. From Lombok Airport about 30 minutes. Public transportation and online ojek available.
